title: ProductPurchase
description: Represents an in-app product purchase. Contains the purchase state, consumption status, and order information.

purchaseTimeMillis.description: Time the product was purchased (milliseconds since Epoch).

purchaseState.description: The purchase state of the order. 0 = Purchased, 1 = Canceled, 2 = Pending.

consumptionState.description: The consumption state of the in-app product. 0 = Yet to be consumed, 1 = Consumed.

developerPayload.description: Developer-specified string for additional transaction information.

orderId.description: The order ID associated with the purchase.

purchaseType.description: The type of purchase. 0 = Test (sandbox), 1 = Promo, 2 = Rewarded.

acknowledgementState.description: The acknowledgement state of the in-app product. 0 = Yet to be acknowledged, 1 = Acknowledged.

purchaseToken.description: The purchase token generated at the time of purchase.

quantity.description: The quantity associated with the purchase.

obfuscatedExternalAccountId.description: An obfuscated version of the ID uniquely associated with the user's account in your app.

obfuscatedExternalProfileId.description: An obfuscated version of the ID uniquely associated with the user's profile in your app.

regionCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 billing region code of the user.
